comment: первая встреча и до того, как решаем судьбу выживших

languages.text: "Владыка Галактики простил наши грехи! Звездные посланцы спустились с небес, чтобы спасти нас!"

traits.locale_text: "Владыка Галактики простил наши грехи! Звездные посланцы спустились с небес, чтобы спасти нас!"
"Владыка Галактики простил наши грехи! Звездные посланцы спустились с небес, чтобы спасти нас!"

languages.text: "Lord of the Galaxy has absolved us! The heavenly envoys came down from the stars to save us!"
languages.original_text: "Владыка Галактики простил наши грехи! Звездные посланцы спустились с небес, чтобы спасти нас!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord of the Galaxy has absolved us of all sin! The heavenly envoys came down from the stars to save us!"
"Lord of the Galaxy has absolved us of all sin! The heavenly envoys came down from the stars to save us!"
"Lord of the Galaxy has absolved us! The heavenly envoys came down from the stars to save us!"

languages.text: "Der Herr der Galaxis hat uns die Absolution erteilt! Die himmlischen Gesandten kamen von den Sternen herab, um uns zu retten!"
languages.original_text: "Lord of the Galaxy has absolved us! The heavenly envoys came down from the stars to save us!"

languages.text: "Le Seigneur de la galaxie nous a absous ! Les envoyés célestes sont descendus des étoiles pour nous sauver !"
languages.original_text: "Lord of the Galaxy has absolved us! The heavenly envoys came down from the stars to save us!"

languages.text: "银河系之王赦免了我们天国使者从星空中降临拯救我们！"
languages.original_text: "Lord of the Galaxy has absolved us! The heavenly envoys came down from the stars to save us!"

languages.text: "¡El Señor de la Galaxia nos ha absuelto! Los enviados celestiales bajaron de las estrellas para salvarnos".
languages.original_text: "Lord of the Galaxy has absolved us! The heavenly envoys came down from the stars to save us!"

languages.text: "銀河の主が私たちを赦された！天の使いが我々を救うために星々から降りてきたのだ！"
languages.original_text: "Lord of the Galaxy has absolved us! The heavenly envoys came down from the stars to save us!"

languages.text: "Galaksinin Efendisi bizi bağışladı! Göksel elçiler bizi kurtarmak için yıldızlardan indi!"
languages.original_text: "Lord of the Galaxy has absolved us! The heavenly envoys came down from the stars to save us!"
